interpretation: At n=12, the survival-minus-commblind win-margin is -0.0244 (95% CI [-0.0817, 0.0226]). The CI includes 0: NO detectable effect. This null bounds the true effect: with 80% power at n=12 we could have detected an effect >= 0.0781; the observed -0.0244 would need 124 seeds to reach 80% power.
